tagline: #1 ranked HVAC franchise in its category backed by 30 years of proof, recurring maintenance revenue, and a manager-run executive ownership model inside Neighborly's $4.1B home services ecosystem.
description_short: Aire Serv is a 30-year-old HVAC franchise with 229 U.S. locations operating under Neighborly's national home services platform. Owners function as executives, hiring a licensed HVAC manager and technician team while focusing on business development and market growth with no technical background required. At $113K to $272K total investment and a system-wide average of $1.56M in gross sales, the model targets leaders seeking a recession-resistant, recurring revenue business in an essential services sector.
market_intelligence_insight: U.S. HVAC services market reached $69.9B in 2025 growing at 6.3% CAGR to $94.7B by 2030, driven by aging building stock, mandatory HFC refrigerant phase-downs, energy efficiency mandates, and rising data center demand with repair and replacement commanding 46% of all service revenue.
item_19_headline: Average gross sales of $1.56M across 172 reporting U.S. units for the 2025 fiscal year.
ongoing_support: field support,business coach,annual Reunion conference,regional training events,Neighborly HUB peer network,local and national marketing tools,ServiceTitan software support
